content.speakerText: What’s the plan for next quarter? Any support you need?
content.speakerTextCn: 下季度计划是什么？需要什么支持？
expectedAnswers: We’ll roll out the new dashboard in August. Design team needs to finalize mockups by July 20.
We’re continuing with the current workflow—no extra resources required.
The priority is customer onboarding. I’ll need one additional support rep by mid-June.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确说明了下一步行动（如：roll out, continue, prioritize）
是否包含具体时间节点和责任人（如：by July 20, Design team, by mid-June）
是否使用了场景关键词（plan, support, finalize, roll out）

content.speakerText: Can you send me the updated report by EOD?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能在今天下班前发我更新版报告吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure thing—I’ll email it by 5 PM.
Yes, I’m on it and will send it before I leave.
Absolutely, I’ve already started and will send it no later than 4:30 PM.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确承诺具体时间（避免模糊词如‘soon’或‘later’）
是否使用自然口语表达（如：Sure thing, I’m on it）
是否体现责任感（如：already started, no later than）

content.speakerText: Who’s handling the vendor contract renewal?
content.speakerTextCn: 谁负责供应商合同续签？
expectedAnswers: Sarah from Procurement will handle it—she’ll send the draft to legal by Friday.
I’m taking care of it. I’ll have the updated version ready by next Monday.
The contract team is responsible. I’ll coordinate with them and confirm the deadline by tomorrow.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出责任人（Sarah, I, the contract team）
是否包含可追踪的时间节点（by Friday, by next Monday, by tomorrow）
是否使用了场景核心动词（handle, coordinate, send, confirm）
